note: Pre-registered BEFORE any recall ran. Each gold_path is the file a returning developer would need opened to answer. isolation=true marks questions whose answer exists ONLY in this repo (used for cross-scope leak checks).

questions.question: Where does the text-to-speech playback for articles live, and how does tapping the same story again stop it?
Where would we swap the fake articles for a real news API?
Which file defines the news category labels, their icons, and the default user preferences?
Where are the bottom tabs configured, including the hidden leftover starter screen?
Where do we change the app's color palette, spacing scale, and per-category colors?
How does the full-article screen estimate the audio duration from the reading time?
Why do the tab buttons vibrate lightly when pressed on iOS?
Where are the static market index numbers shown on the finance screen defined?
Which document lists what we deliberately have not built yet, like push notifications and a real data feed?
Where do we set the iOS bundle identifier and the splash screen color?
